subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! Render thou praise unto Him Who is the Object of all the world, Who from the Most Great Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید ای کنیز من و دختر کنیز من حمد کن مقصود عالمرا که از بحر اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
